reason: Top-level create-yume layer index and pre-development checklist for this cross-layer template/tooling change.
Defines package.json as a structured hotspot, root-only template boundaries, and tests required for template/manifest policy changes.
Covers workspace root generation, child package target scopes, and root-only tooling/config behavior.
Covers ProjectConfig, presets, defaults, and create spec contracts affected by making Knip default generated tooling.
Defines verification expectations and explicitly requires root verify gates to include Knip.
Thinking triggers for cross-layer changes and code reuse before modifying config/tooling constants.
